nasb.text: Every person is to be in subjection to the governing authorities. For there is no authority except from God, and those which exist are established by God.

esv.text: Let every person be subject to the governing authorities. For there is no authority except from God, and those that exist have been instituted by God.

cnv.text: 政府的權柄，人人都應當服從。因為沒有一樣權柄不是從　神來的；掌權的都是　神設立的。

ccb.text: 人人都要服从政府的权柄，因为所有的权柄都是出于上帝。现存的政权都是上帝设立的。

csbs.text: 所有的人都当服从在上掌权的，因为没有一个掌权的不是出于神。所有掌权的，都是由神所指定的。
